title: agent-review findings
description: Canonical shape the skill normalizes any backend's review into. Adapted from openai/codex-plugin-cc's review-output.schema.json to this repo's Critical/Major/Minor vocabulary; confidence and line_end are optional because the CLI backends (codex review, ollama analyze-*) do not always emit them.

adversarial.description: true when the review challenged the approach rather than reviewing line-by-line

verdict.description: needs-attention if any Critical or Major finding exists; otherwise approve

confidence.description: omit unless the backend reported a confidence; do not fabricate
